context: Tests whether the agent avoids decorative Liquid Glass in the content layer and handles clear glass legibility.

checklist.name: Content layer boundary
checklist.description: Warns against using Liquid Glass as decoration for the static chart or card.

checklist.name: Action target
checklist.description: Treats the Play button as the actionable element that may receive glass styling.

checklist.name: Configurable button
checklist.description: Uses or names the configurable SwiftUI glass button style when a clear glass button variant is needed.

checklist.name: Clear legibility
checklist.description: Requires dimming, contrast treatment, or verification when clear glass appears over a bright or rich background.

checklist.name: Availability fallback
checklist.description: Includes iOS 26 availability gating or a fallback treatment for earlier systems.
